description: Fix critical TDZ crash and catalog cache QuotaExceededError issues found in code review
steps: STEP 1 - Fix TDZ crash: Move INTL FORMATTERS section (containing _todayFmt and other Intl.DateTimeFormat declarations) above the billsQuery and daybookQuery definitions that call getStartOfTodayTimestamp(), which references _todayFmt.

STEP 2 - Fix catalog cache QuotaExceededError: Wrap localStorage.setItem('catalogCache', ...) in its own try/catch so a QuotaExceededError does not propagate to the outer catch block that would leave products empty.
acceptance_criteria: _todayFmt is declared before getStartOfTodayTimestamp() is called at module top-level
localStorage.setItem for catalogCache is wrapped in its own try/catch
No syntax errors in the modified script.js
verification: Run npx acorn --ecma2022 --module billingappfiles/script.js to confirm no syntax errors
Confirm INTL FORMATTERS section appears before the query definitions in the file
findings: Both fixes applied and validated with acorn parser (exit code 0). The INTL FORMATTERS section now appears between the collection definitions and the query definitions, ensuring _todayFmt is initialized before getStartOfTodayTimestamp() is called.
